title: Kyonyuu ga Futari Inai to Bokki Shinai Otto no Tame ni Tomodachi wo Tsuretekita Tsuma

synonyms: I Can't Get It up Without Two Pairs of Big Breasts, So My Wife Brought Her Friend!
alternative_titles.ja: 巨乳が2人いないと勃起しない夫のために友達を連れてきた妻

synopsis: Newlywed couple Yuuto and Sae enjoy their honeymoon phase but Yuuto suddenly can't get aroused anymore due to his fetish for harems. Sae agonizes then asks her big-breasted friend Emi for help. Yuuto hesitates at the wife-approved threesome but when faced with Emi he loses control, turning the bedroom into a harem paradise.
